1795000.name: Exploding Babies OST Vol.I
1795000.description:
All the songs you love from the Exploding Babies in-game soundtrack - now as extended versions, for your listening pleasure!

This is Volume ONE of the Soundtrack Collection. It contains all current and future songs from the main soundtrack. Volume TWO, released later, will contain remixed songs and music inspired by the Exploding Babies Universe, that are not part of the core soundtrack.
